ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response option */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text describing the response option */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the response option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the response option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age bracket */,
  "bracket_range" TEXT /* Range of ages represented by the bracket */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the age bracket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the age bracket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the age bracket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_age_brackets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response option selected */,
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age bracket the respondent belongs to */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Count of responses for the option within the bracket */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES response_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("bracket_id") REFERENCES age_brackets ("bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id", "permission_id")
)
